title: Salty Velvety Australian Kale Salad
description: A low-carb-friendly brunch dish featuring kale cooked under pressure for a salty and velvety texture that pairs well with citrus dressing.
instructions: Wash and tear the kale into bite-sized pieces.
Add the kale to a pressure cooker with a pinch of salt. Cook for 2 minutes on high pressure.
Remove from heat, allow it to sit for another minute before opening the lid.
Cut the avocado into slices or chunks.
In a small bowl, mix together lemon zest and olive oil until well combined. Season to taste with additional salt.
Gently toss cooked kale with sliced avocado and dressing.
